[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A stylized cartoon image shows a pink shark-like creature with an open mouth and a green-and-purple rectangular object in its lower body, with large white text overlaid on a dark background.

The main subject is a cartoon character resembling a shark or fish with a pink body, a wide open mouth showing white teeth, and a black outline around the head and body; a green rectangular panel with a purple patch and small purple and white marks sits across the lower torso area. The overlaid text includes “MAMAH” at the top and “ADA SMPR” in the center-lower area, with the latter in very large white capital letters.

The setting is unclear but appears to be a dark, digital or graphic background with a blue and black gradient and faint horizontal lines near the bottom, suggesting an illustrated scene or screen capture.

Visible text: MAMAH
ADA SMPR

Practical Summary: The image is a cartoon-style graphic of a pink shark-like creature with an open mouth. Bold white text reads “MAMAH” and “ADA SMPR” over the scene.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

MAMAH  
ADA SMP  

# Structured Version

- MAMAH  
- ADA SMP  

# Notes

None

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
